title: Oportun Financial Corporation (OPRT) Q1 2021 Earnings
text: Oportun Financial Corporation (OPRT) reported Q1 2021 earnings of $0.41 per share, significantly outperforming analyst expectations. The company beat the consensus estimate of $0.20 per share by a substantial margin, representing a 105% earnings surprise. This compared favorably to the prior year's loss of $0.04 per share. The company generated $135.3 million in quarterly revenues, falling short of the consensus estimate of $147.6 million by 8.27%. Year-over-year, revenues declined from $163.4 million in the prior year period. Over the last four quarters, the company has surpassed consensus EPS estimates three times. The previous quarter showed even stronger performance, with earnings of $0.60 beating expectations of $0.14, delivering a 328.57% surprise. Following the earnings release, Oportun received a Zacks Rank #2 (Buy) rating. Analysts projected upcoming quarter earnings of $0.28 per share on $157.96 million in revenues, with full-year fiscal expectations of $1.59 earnings per share on $662.03 million in revenues.
